message:
feat(term): resize-time bounded KP wrapping with scorecards, readability gates, and cursor consistency telemetry

Integrate the bounded Knuth-Plass line-wrapping engine into the terminal
resize path with configurable cost models, per-resize quality scorecards,
readability regression gates, and cursor mapping consistency telemetry.

frankenterm-surface (line.rs + mod.rs):
- Promote MonospaceKpCostModel, MonospaceWrapMode, MonospaceWrapPlan,
  and KP_BADNESS_INF / KP_DEFAULT_* constants from pub(crate) to pub.
  Remove dead_code allows — these are now consumed by the config and
  screen layers.
- Add `LineWrapScorecard` struct capturing per-line wrap quality metrics:
  greedy vs selected total cost, badness delta, forced break counts,
  line count, and DP state counts.
- Add `LineWrapReport` struct combining wrapped lines with their scorecard.
- Add `Line::wrap_with_report()` public method that returns a full
  LineWrapReport (the existing `wrap_with_cost_model()` delegates to it).
- Add `evaluate_break_offsets()` helper that scores an arbitrary set of
  break offsets against a cost model for scorecard comparison.
- Add `greedy_break_offsets_from_tokens()` for generating greedy-baseline
  break positions.
- Add `saturating_diff_i64()` for safe u64→i64 delta computation.
- Add comprehensive wrap quality corpus test framework (5 categories:
  code, logs, prose, long_token, unicode) with per-sample badness delta
  gates and aggregate fallback ratio assertions.
- Tests: `wrap_quality_corpus_covers_required_categories`,
  `wrap_quality_scorecard_outputs_machine_readable_payload`,
  `wrap_quality_regression_gate_bounds_kp_and_fallback_deltas`.

frankenterm-term (config.rs):
- Add TerminalConfiguration trait methods: `resize_wrap_kp_cost_model()`,
  `resize_wrap_scorecard_enabled()`, `resize_wrap_readability_gate_enabled()`,
  and three readability threshold accessors with safe defaults.

frankenterm-term (screen.rs):
- Add `ResizeWrapPolicy`, `ResizeReadabilityGatePolicy`,
  `ResizeWrapScorecard`, `ResizeWrapGateStatus`, and
  `ResizeWrapGateFailureReason` types for the resize-time quality system.
- Add `CursorConsistencyTelemetry` tracking pass/fail counts for cursor
  mapping validation after resize.
- Add `Screen::wrap_single_logical_line_for_resize()` that dispatches to
  the appropriate wrap method based on policy (plain wrap, cost-model wrap,
  or full scorecard-emitting wrap_with_report).
- Integrate scorecard collection into both single-threaded and
  multi-threaded reflow batch paths.
- After reflow completes, evaluate the readability gate against policy
  thresholds and emit a machine-readable JSON payload via `warn!` (fail)
  or `debug!` (pass/disabled).
- Record cursor consistency telemetry after every resize via
  `record_cursor_consistency_telemetry()`.
- Store last scorecard and gate payload on Screen for test inspection.

frankenterm-term (test/mod.rs):
- Add `visible_text_snapshot()` helper.
- `test_resize_wrap_kp_policy_preserves_legacy_visible_semantics`:
  verifies that forced-legacy (max_dp_states=0) and default KP produce
  identical visible text across a resize churn sequence.
- `test_resize_wrap_scorecard_gate_emits_machine_readable_failure`:
  forces all-fallback wrapping against a 0% fallback gate and asserts
  the gate payload contains the expected JSON structure.

frankenterm-term (tests/cursor_consistency.rs — NEW, 327 LOC):
- Integration test module for cursor consistency validation across resize
  sequences, verifying that cursor position roundtrips survive narrow
  widths, DPI changes, and scrollback-heavy scenarios.

frankenterm-config (config.rs):
- Add 9 new config fields: resize_wrap_kp_badness_scale,
  resize_wrap_kp_forced_break_penalty, resize_wrap_kp_lookahead_limit,
  resize_wrap_kp_max_dp_states, resize_wrap_scorecard_enabled,
  resize_wrap_readability_gate_enabled,
  resize_wrap_readability_max_line_badness_delta,
  resize_wrap_readability_max_total_badness_delta,
  resize_wrap_readability_max_fallback_ratio_percent.
- Add default functions, validation functions, and import reorganization.
- Fix missing semicolon in config loading error path.

frankenterm-config (terminal.rs):
- Bridge all 9 new config fields through TermConfig's
  TerminalConfiguration impl.
- Add test: `term_config_maps_resize_wrap_controls_from_config_handle`
  verifying end-to-end config override → TerminalConfiguration readout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
